mapper.sql: id, created_time, updated_time, is_delete, admin_user_id, username, password_hash, display_name, mobile_masked, email_masked, admin_status, permission_version, last_login_time
mapper.select: select from admin_users where id = #{id} and is_delete = 0 limit 1
select from admin_users where admin_user_id = #{adminUserId} and is_delete = 0 limit 1
select from admin_users where username = #{username} and is_delete = 0 limit 1

select from admin_users
order by id desc

select from admin_users
order by id desc limit #{limit} offset #{offset}
mapper.insert: insert into admin_users (created_time, updated_time, is_delete, admin_user_id, username, password_hash, display_name, mobile_masked, email_masked, admin_status, permission_version, last_login_time) values (#{createdTime}, #{updatedTime}, #{isDelete}, #{adminUserId}, #{username}, #{passwordHash}, #{displayName}, #{mobileMasked}, #{emailMasked}, #{adminStatus}, #{permissionVersion}, #{lastLoginTime})

insert into admin_users (created_time, updated_time, is_delete, admin_user_id, username, password_hash, display_name, mobile_masked, email_masked, admin_status, permission_version, last_login_time) values
(#{item.createdTime}, #{item.updatedTime}, #{item.isDelete}, #{item.adminUserId}, #{item.username}, #{item.passwordHash}, #{item.displayName}, #{item.mobileMasked}, #{item.emailMasked}, #{item.adminStatus}, #{item.permissionVersion}, #{item.lastLoginTime})
mapper.update: update admin_users set username = #{username}, password_hash = #{passwordHash}, display_name = #{displayName}, mobile_masked = #{mobileMasked}, email_masked = #{emailMasked}, admin_status = #{adminStatus}, permission_version = #{permissionVersion}, last_login_time = #{lastLoginTime}, updated_time = #{updatedTime}, is_delete = #{isDelete} where id = #{id}

update admin_users set username = #{username}, password_hash = #{passwordHash}, display_name = #{displayName}, mobile_masked = #{mobileMasked}, email_masked = #{emailMasked}, admin_status = #{adminStatus}, permission_version = #{permissionVersion}, last_login_time = #{lastLoginTime}, updated_time = #{updatedTime}, is_delete = #{isDelete} where admin_user_id = #{adminUserId}

update.foreach: update admin_users set username = #{item.username}, password_hash = #{item.passwordHash}, display_name = #{item.displayName}, mobile_masked = #{item.mobileMasked}, email_masked = #{item.emailMasked}, admin_status = #{item.adminStatus}, permission_version = #{item.permissionVersion}, last_login_time = #{item.lastLoginTime}, updated_time = #{item.updatedTime}, is_delete = #{item.isDelete} where admin_user_id = #{item.adminUserId}
